Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The European AllSky7 fireball network 105 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. Why so many control rooms were seafoam green (2025) 964 upvotes, 197 comments
  3. Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer 313 upvotes, 90 comments
  4. Local Bernstein theory, and lower bounds for Lebesgue constants 40 upvotes, 7 comments
  5. Meow.camera 20 upvotes, 2 comments
  6. Sand from Different Beaches in the World 27 upvotes, 4 comments
  7. AI got the blame for the Iran school bombing. The truth is more worrying 28 upvotes, 5 comments
  8. Installing a Let's Encrypt TLS Certificate on a Brother Printer with Certbot 91 upvotes, 28 comments
  9. How and why to take a logarithm of an image [video] 133 upvotes, 46 comments
  10. Desk for people who work at home with a cat 115 upvotes, 47 comments
  11. Iran-linked hackers have breached FBI director's personal emails 73 upvotes, 27 comments
  12. $500 GPU outperforms Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks 438 upvotes, 238 comments
  13. Anatomy of the .claude/ folder 164 upvotes, 87 comments
  14. Gzip decompression in 250 lines of Rust 60 upvotes, 27 comments
  15. A Faster Alternative to Jq 311 upvotes, 189 comments
  16. The 'paperwork flood': How I drowned a bureaucrat before dinner 421 upvotes, 332 comments
  17. EMachines never obsolete PCs: More than a meme 30 upvotes, 15 comments
  18. Apple says no one using Lockdown Mode has been hacked with spyware 44 upvotes, 26 comments
  19. Embracing Bayesian Methods in Clinical Trials 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. Hold on to Your Hardware 427 upvotes, 361 comments
  21. Everything old is new again: memory optimization 126 upvotes, 97 comments
  22. Schedule tasks on the web 246 upvotes, 207 comments
  23. Apple discontinues the Mac Pro 577 upvotes, 538 comments
  24. People inside Microsoft are fighting to drop mandatory Microsoft Account 157 upvotes, 131 comments
  25. The Legibility of Serif and Sans Serif Typefaces (2022) 66 upvotes, 51 comments
  26. Last gasps of the rent seeking class? 69 upvotes, 55 comments
  27. I am leaving the AI party after one drink 63 upvotes, 50 comments
  28. ‘Energy independence feels practical’: Europeans building mini solar farms 72 upvotes, 78 comments
  29. Should QA exist? 34 upvotes, 71 comments
  30. 21,864 Yugoslavian .yu domains 21 upvotes, 49 comments

Last generated 1:30am, 28 March 2026. Source here.
